Video.title: JBB United vs Drivers (Mixed)

Image.alt: JBB United vs Drivers (Mixed)
JBB United vs Drivers (Mixed)
JBB United vs Drivers (Mixed)

Video.summary: In the finals of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, the Fort Myers Flamingos and the GMV Chomp go head-to-head. The commentators, including Angel, highlight the youth and fire of Fort Myers player Jade and the consistent dominance of the number one women's team, the GMV Chomp. The match is a best-of-three, rally-scoring format with games to 21. The episode showcases impressive plays from Stevie and Kelsey, and praises Heather Nobler's "nasty" two-handed backhand. The commentators also discuss the challenge for the team coming out of pool number two, which has less rest time before the finals.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: This episode provides courtside commentary on Game 3 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, featuring the Fort Myers Flamingos and the Old Town Bangers. The commentators highlight the aggressive play of newcomer Jada Bui and the defensive prowess of Ellie Schele. They also discuss the importance of mental toughness and team chemistry in a high-pressure environment. The episode concludes with a preview of the upcoming men's match.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.
Video.title: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Image.alt: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Video.summary: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of men’s and women’s doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: It's Super Sunday on Day 3 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Game Number Five pits the Chennai Super Champs against the Delhi team (Dilwale) at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
